sections.paragraph:
i.q. מוּשׁ No. II. to feel, to touch, with an acc. (Arab. مَسَّ, Gr. μάσσω, Ethiop. by inserting ר, መርሰሰ፡ id.) Gen 27:12 compare מוּשׁ V. 21 Gen 27:21.

Piel id. to feel (in the darkness), to grope, Deu 28:29 Job 5:14 with an acc. to feel out, to explore with the hands, Gen 31:34, 37 Gen 31:37 Job 12:25, יְמַֽשְׁשׁוּ חשֶׁךְ “they feel the darkness.”

Hiphil id. with acc. Exo 10:21.
